name: Olga travel-diary 6-frame slice (eval baseline)
subject: Olga family across travel destinations 2017-2021
notes: Travel-diary arc — same core travelers (Olga + partner + 2 kids) across 6 distinct locations and years: Tenerife garden 2017-05, Prague Municipal House 2017-07, Warsaw Old Town 2018-08, Czech rock formations 2018-09, Mt Hermon ski 2020-02, Mediterranean garden 2021-06. Identity continuity across changing settings is the core challenge (different from 02_olga_slice life-montage which holds setting and shifts age). Chronological order = sort_key 1..6.
